message:
🐛 Fix MSW mocks returning invalid JSON for workload endpoints

The hooks useStatefulSets, useDaemonSets, and useCronJobs fetch from
/statefulsets, /daemonsets, /cronjobs (when LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL is empty
in demo/test mode), but MSW only had handlers at /api/mcp/statefulsets etc.
Unmatched requests fell through to the SPA catch-all returning HTML,
causing 'Invalid JSON response from API' errors.

Add MSW handlers at the non-prefixed paths so both /api/mcp/* and /*
paths return valid JSON responses.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
